name: Sherazade: The Untold Stories
overview: The true story of the classic Arabian Nights tales. We follow Sherazade, the real hero of the famous stories, on her quest to find the Tree of Life and save the Prince of the Golden City, who has been turned into a blue-haired monster.

trailers.title: Amazon Prime Video | The untold stories #Sherazade
